---
title: ""
description: ""
---

## Selected publications and preprints

::: {.publication}

### Krylov Smoothers for Solving Linear Systems

**Rahul Manavalan** and Mengwu Guo

*Manuscript in preparation.*
[PDF](assets/papers/sample-paper.pdf){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline}
<details>
<summary><strong>BibTeX</strong></summary>

```bibtex
@unpublished{manavalan2026linearflows,
  title  = {Krylov Smoothers for Solving Linear Systems},
  author = {Manavalan, Rahul and Guo, Mengwu},
  year   = {2026},
  note   = {Manuscript in preparation}
}
```
</details>

:::

---

::: {.publication}

### Inertial Cahn--Hilliard Flows for Image Inpainting

**Rahul Manavalan** and Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb

*Manuscript in preparation.*
[PDF](assets/papers/sample-paper.pdf){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline}
<details>
<summary><strong>BibTeX</strong></summary>

```bibtex
@unpublished{manavalan2026inertialinpainting,
  title  = {Inertial Cahn--Hilliard Flows for Image Inpainting},
  author = {Manavalan, Rahul and Sch{\"o}nlieb, Carola-Bibiane},
  year   = {2026},
  note   = {Manuscript in preparation}
}
```
</details>

:::

---

::: {.publication}

### Boundary-Aware Kernel Interpolation on Symmetric Domains

**Rahul Manavalan** and Elisabeth Larsson

*Manuscript in preparation.*
[PDF](assets/papers/sample-paper.pdf){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline}
<details>
<summary><strong>BibTeX</strong></summary>

```bibtex
@unpublished{manavalan2026boundarykernels,
  title  = {Boundary-Aware Kernel Interpolation on Symmetric Domains},
  author = {Manavalan, Rahul and Larsson, Elisabeth},
  year   = {2026},
  note   = {Manuscript in preparation}
}
```
</details>

:::
